response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software craftsmanship, clean code practices, and ability to work on complex systems, he is fundamentally misaligned with the role's technical requirements. His recent work (last 5+ years) centers on Node.js/TypeScript rather than JVM technologies. Critically, he lacks demonstrated expertise in Java, Kotlin, Spring, and enterprise frameworks—all essential for this mid-senior IDE tooling role. His Java experience appears dated (Altom 2016-2018), and there is no evidence of IDE internals, language tooling, or build system expertise beyond a single C IDE role in 2014-2015.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship foundation with proven expertise in TDD, clean architecture, and large-scale system design
Demonstrated ability to work across complex technical domains and multiple programming paradigms
Track record of mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops and community involvement
concerns: Primary focus for past 5+ years has been Node.js/TypeScript rather than JVM ecosystem, creating a significant tech stack mismatch
No demonstrated expertise in Spring, Kotlin, Quarkus, Hibernate, or other enterprise frameworks required for this role
Limited recent experience with IDE internals or language tooling; last relevant experience was LabWindows IDE work in 2014-2015

key_factors.factor: Recent tech stack (Node.js vs required JVM)
